import collections
import itertools
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Constants
ITEMS = ['apple', 'banana']

def task_func(a, b, items=ITEMS):
    combined_list = list(itertools.chain(a, b))
    freq_counter = collections.Counter(combined_list)

    # Plotting bar chart
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(items, freq_counter[ITEMS])
    ax.set_title('Frequency Chart')
    ax.set_xticks(range(len(ITEMS)))
    ax.set_xticklabels(ITEMS)
    plt.show()

    return (fig, ax), dict(freq_counter[ITEMS])
